Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to compare two event logs Group A and Group B representing hiring processes for a protected group and an unprotected group respectively

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The key difference highlighted is the ScoreAdjustment for LocalBusinessLeadersClub membership in Group B plus 5 to Cultural Fit

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I need to identify which log exhibits bias explain how it manifests and discuss implications for fairness and equity
